name: desktop-pet-2
description: Local-first Windows intelligent emotional desktop pet MVP.

scripts.verify:pet-sprite: python -m py_compile scripts/pet_action_pipeline.py scripts/verify_pet_action_pipeline.py scripts/verify_pet_sprite_e2e.py && python scripts/verify_pet_action_pipeline.py && python scripts/verify_pet_sprite_e2e.py && node scripts/verify_deepseek_request.mjs && node scripts/verify_pet_sprite_actions.mjs && node scripts/verify_pet_sprite_structure.mjs && node scripts/verify_pet_sprite_job_paths.mjs && node scripts/verify_pet_sprite_apply.mjs && node scripts/verify_pet_sprite_playback.mjs && node scripts/verify_pet_sprite_state.mjs && node scripts/verify_memory_engine.mjs && node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/preload/panelPreload.cjs && node --check src/preload/panelPreload.js && npm run build
